title: ObjectContext

objectId.description: URN of the resource being accessed.

objectType.description: The kind of resource being accessed.

tags.description: Classification tags currently applied to this resource (e.g., 'pii', 'health').

attributes.description: Additional key/value attributes for fine-grained policy conditions.

description: The object (resource) side of a policy evaluation request, identifying the target resource by URN, type, classification tags, zone, and arbitrary attributes.
